input_notes: Choose your language: → 0 (English)
Please choose the language in which you wish to play the game: → 1 (English)
Would you like to display the readme? → N (No)
Would you like to display the components from [Fixes]? → Y (Yes)
Would you like to display the components from [Tweaks]? → Y (Yes)
Install Component [Check for and fix incorrect spell animations]? → I (Install)
Install Component [Add spell school notifications to the combat log]? → 2 (All spells with a casting time greater than 2)
Install Component [Add expiration notifications for buffs]? → I (Install)
Install Component [Add expiration notifications for item buffs]? → I (Install)
Install Component [Reveal all hidden doors]? → N (Not Install)
Would you like to display the readme? → N (No)
[A]sk about each component, [S]kip all, or choose a pre-defined selection → A (Ask about each component)
Would you like to display the components from [Optional]? → Y (Yes)
Would you like to display the components from [Experimental | WARNING: Only install if you understand the risks]? → N (No)
Install Component [EEex]? → I (Install)
Install Component [Enable effect menu module: LShift-on-hover to view spells affecting creature]? → I (Install)
Install Component [Enable empty container module: Highlight empty containers in gray instead of cyan]? → I (Install)
Install Component [Enable hotkey module: Edit override/B3Hotkey.lua to create advanced spell hotkeys]? → N (Not Install)
Install Component [Enable scale module: Customizable UI scaling factor]? → N (Not Install)
Install Component [Enable time step module: Advance 1 game tick on keypress]? → N (Not Install)
Install Component [Enable timer module: Visual indicators for modal actions, contingencies, and spell/item cooldowns]? → I (Install)
